spec.name: A Paved Road
spec.description: You are on a paved road that runs east to west. You can see an elaborate looking estate to the south and to the north-west, off in the distance, you can see a very large stone structure.

east.description: The road leads off to the east.

south.description: It looks like a Nobleman's estate. We are talking RICH nobleman's estate.

west.description: The road leads west towards the highway.

extra_descs.description: That would probably be the Coliseum. There are a few good matches scheduled for today.
